pi_items.source: Task setup and export scripts enforce this expected output path.
Task setup and export scripts enforce this expected output path.
Calculated Kruskal-Wallis test (H = 40.6689, df = 2, p = 1.47e-09) on the real Crampton 1947 ToothGrowth dataset.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the real Crampton (1947) ToothGrowth dataset. Independent calculations confirm that a Kruskal-Wallis test for tooth length by dose yields an H-statistic of 40.67 on 2 degrees of freedom, with a highly significant p-value (p < 0.001). Additionally, Dunn's post-hoc pairwise comparisons show significant differences for all three dose level pairings. The correct JASP and report output file paths were also confirmed from task scripts.
